description.p: DownloadThis is a graphical interface for yt-dlp. Extract audio from YouTube, SoundCloud, and 1000+ sites. Supports mp3, flac, opus, m4a and wav. Features a real-time download queue with progress bars, cookie support, playlist downloads, and a retro Windows XP / P2P aesthetic.

ul.li: Download audio from 1000+ sites via yt-dlp
Real-time queue with per-item progress bars
Format and quality selection (mp3, flac, opus, m4a, wav)
Playlist support with individual item tracking
Cookie file support for age-restricted or private content
